prose:
**Aniline Frontier Orbital Energies and Gap**

DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: input from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`; the DFT was a single point on this geometry. SCF converged in 9 cycles.

HOMO = −5.553772 eV
LUMO = −0.2489544 eV
